expected_properties: valid_out remains high for four consecutive clock cycles after a parallel load
additional_cases.goal: Confirm that the valid_out pulse duration matches the four-bit serialization period
stimulus_intent: Apply a single parallel word and monitor the duration of valid_out
timing_assumptions: Conservative observation; do not assume exact cycle alignment, only that the high period spans at least four cycles

expected_properties: dout outputs the bits of d in MSB‑to‑LSB order over successive cycles
additional_cases.goal: Validate correct bit ordering of the serial output stream
stimulus_intent: Load a distinct pattern (e.g., 4'b1010) and verify the observed dout sequence
timing_assumptions: Observe over at least four clock cycles after valid_out becomes asserted

expected_properties: After deasserting rst_n, valid_out and dout settle to a known idle state (e.g., 0)
additional_cases.goal: Ensure the module initializes to a defined state after reset release
stimulus_intent: Assert rst_n low for several cycles then release and observe output stabilization
timing_assumptions: Observe for at least two clock cycles after reset release

expected_properties: valid_out asserts for exactly four consecutive cycles after a new parallel load
dout follows the MSB‑to‑LSB order of the loaded d
baseline_case_enrichments.goal: Verify that a single parallel load produces the correct serial stream and associated valid_out timing
notes: Assumes the internal counter resets on load; does not rely on exact cycle numbers beyond observable valid_out high period
stimulus_intent: Load a representative parallel word and observe the resulting serial output and valid_out behavior
timing_assumptions: Observe over at least five clock cycles after stimulus to capture the full serial sequence
